angielski-w-zlobku-autumn-pack.title: Nursery: Autumn Pack (Sep-Nov)
angielski-w-zlobku-autumn-pack.description:
What will you find in the Autumn Pack for toddlers?
60 ready-to-use lesson plans with PDF materials for the entire Autumn (September, October, November)!
🎵 Rhymes, songs and games for simple melodies
✋ Ideas for using everyday objects
🐿 Scenarios created from the experience of a mom and teacher 😉
📄 Ready-to-print PDF materials - zero stress before classes
Did you know that...
📷 All illustrations in the package are photos, not drawings, so the youngest children can easier recognize and remember animals, fruits or objects - a solution in the spirit of Montessori pedagogy
📅 In each month you will find as many as 20 ready scenarios - you can conduct classes every day or choose those that best suit your group
💡 Each topic includes sensory, movement and musical activities - supporting speech development, motor skills and concentration even in the youngest children

thanksgiving-fun.title: Thanksgiving Fun
thanksgiving-fun.description:
If you want to take your students in grades 1-4 on a fascinating (and delicious!) journey to the origins of American Thanksgiving, be sure to organize classes with the Thanksgiving Set!
The set includes:
• detailed lesson plan with ideas and tips on how to plan a Thanksgiving lesson or workshop
• PDF materials (flashcards, I have, who has? game, menu and dish cards, and dollars for speaking-focused fun using English in a real-life situation - ordering and paying in a Thanksgiving Restaurant, worksheets for listening-based activity based on a short video)
• interactive materials (Thanksgiving symbols guessing game - questions and gradually revealing photos as an introduction to the topic)
• Quizlet vocabulary set

english-zoo-playscript.title: English Zoo Playscript
english-zoo-playscript.description:
A play about learning English that can be organized at any time of the school year? Why not! Let’s go to the zoo - but not just any zoo…
English Zoo is a play where various animals help children learn English - good fun guaranteed! You can organize it for English Language Day at your school, European Day of Languages, an open day, the beginning or end of the school year… - it fits truly every occasion!
The English Zoo Playscript set includes:
• LIST OF ROLES (for 8-10 people + unlimited number of people participating in the musical performance)
• LIST OF PROPS AND DECORATIONS
• SCRIPT (4 scenes)
• SONG PERFORMANCE (lyrics with choreography and MP3 recording)
• PRINTABLE DECORATIONS (large zoo sign, animal name badges)
Recommended age of students: 0-3 grades

under-the-sea-gotowe-zajecia.title: Under the Sea: Ready-to-use lesson
under-the-sea-gotowe-zajecia.description:
The Under the Sea (Oceans Day) set is ready-to-use materials for Oceans Day (08.06) or any maritime-themed classes.
During the lesson, we will set out on a fascinating journey deep into the ocean, where we’ll learn the names of various sea creatures, practice using adjectives (opposites) in an original interactive Quiz, try to find animals hidden in aquariums, and even turn into inhabitants of a coral reef ourselves!
A detailed LESSON PLAN includes various variants of ideas, so you can adapt the materials for both younger and older students!
The set includes both PRINTABLE COMPONENTS and MULTIMEDIA COMPONENTS

st-patricks-day.title: St. Patrick's Day: Ready-to-use lesson
st-patricks-day.description:
The St. Patrick's Day set is ready-to-use materials for St. Patrick’s Day (17.03) or any Irish-themed classes.
During the lesson, we will set out on a fascinating journey to green Ireland, where we’ll learn the history and traditions associated with this day, look for a pot of gold at the end of the rainbow following the clues of a mischievous leprechaun, practice using the Past Simple tense in an original interactive Quiz, and even turn into inhabitants of the emerald isle ourselves!
A detailed LESSON PLAN includes various variants of ideas, so you can adapt the materials for both younger and older students!
The set includes both PRINTABLE COMPONENTS and MULTIMEDIA COMPONENTS

powakacyjna-powtorka-klasy-1-3.title: Back to School: Revision for grades 1-3
powakacyjna-powtorka-klasy-1-3.description:
The Back to School: grades 1-3 set is materials for the first lessons in September that will help students recall content from the previous school year in an engaging and stress-free way.
During classes, we will review, among others, numbers, colors, names of clothes, body parts, school supplies, and animal names by participating in movement games, guessing riddles in a multimedia Quiz, playing interactive vocabulary games, and even taking part in an 'I spy' field game in the classroom or school garden!
A detailed LESSON PLAN includes various variants of ideas, so you can adapt the materials for both younger and older students!
The set includes both PRINTABLE COMPONENTS and MULTIMEDIA COMPONENTS

dzien-jezykow.description: Ready materials for European Day of Languages or Europe Day.

scenariusz-przedstawienia-lato.title: Summer Playscript: Ready-to-use lesson
scenariusz-przedstawienia-lato.description:
The Summer Playscript set is ready-to-use materials for the end of the school year (June) or any summer-themed classes.
In the set, you will find 'The Summer' playscript, a list of roles and props, printable materials, and an original interactive vocabulary-building Quiz.
A detailed LESSON PLAN will help you easily plan a Magic Summer lesson!
The set includes both PRINTABLE COMPONENTS and MULTIMEDIA COMPONENTS

lets-celebrate.title: Let's Celebrate: Children's Day
lets-celebrate.description:
The Let's Celebrate (Children's Day) set is ready-to-use materials for Children's Day (01.06) or any classes full of games and activities.
In the set, you will find an original BOARD GAME in printable and interactive versions, an original interactive Quiz, speaking materials, and listening materials based on a short video clip.
A detailed LESSON PLAN includes ideas for games and activities, so you can adapt the materials for both younger and older students!
The set includes both PRINTABLE COMPONENTS and MULTIMEDIA COMPONENTS

autumn-i-spy.title: Autumn I spy: Worksheets
autumn-i-spy.description: The Autumn I spy set includes interactive worksheets that will help students learn and consolidate autumn-related vocabulary in an engaging way.\nDuring classes, we will find and count autumn elements such as leaves, mushrooms, squirrels, or umbrellas, practice perceptiveness, as well as color names and numbers.\nThe set includes ready-to-use PRINTABLE WORKSHEETS
